basic_details.job_title: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Yoga Instructor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: As per rules of National Ayurvedic Institute
qualification.details: Yoga Instructor (Male): As per rules of National Ayurvedic Institute Yoga Instructor (Female): As per rules of National Ayurvedic Institute

salary_details.details: Yoga Instructor (Male): Rs. 8,000 Yoga Instructor (Female): Rs. 5,000

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: gonda.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: gonda.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Yoga Instructor posts is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Yoga Instructor posts is as per the rules of the National Ayurvedic Institute. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Yoga Instructor positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Yoga Instructor positions is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 65 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Yoga Instructor posts is Rs. 8,000 for male candidates and Rs. 5,000 for female candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Yoga Instructors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Yoga Instructor posts, with 2 for male candidates and 3 for female candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application for these posts is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Yoga Instructor posts includes Document Verification and Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Gonda, which is gonda.nic.in. The links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.
